assertion_results.text: Duplicate check searches for sibling issues using JQL with the CVE label and excludes the current issue key (Step 4)
assertion_results.evidence: duplicate-check.md lines 7-11 show the JQL query: 'project = TC AND labels = "CVE-2026-31812" AND issuetype = 10024 AND key != TC-8003'. This searches for sibling issues using the CVE label and explicitly excludes TC-8003 with 'key != TC-8003'.

assertion_results.text: Duplicate check correctly classifies TC-7999 as a same-stream sibling (both have stream suffix [rhtpa-2.2]) and identifies it as a duplicate (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: duplicate-check.md lines 22-26 show stream classification: TC-8003 stream suffix [rhtpa-2.2] (stream 2.2.x) and TC-7999 stream suffix [rhtpa-2.2] (stream 2.2.x), concluding 'TC-7999 is classified as a same-stream sibling'. Step 4.1 (lines 29-40) then identifies it as a duplicate: 'Recommendation: Close TC-8003 as Duplicate of TC-7999.'

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing TC-8003 as Duplicate with resolution 'Duplicate', referencing TC-7999 as the original (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md line 3: 'Decision: Close as Duplicate of TC-7999'. Line 39: 'Transition TC-8003 to Closed with resolution Duplicate'. Line 41: 'Create duplicate link: TC-8003 is duplicate of TC-7999'. The triage procedure table (line 27) also shows Step 4.1 result: 'Close TC-8003 as Duplicate of TC-7999'.

assertion_results.text: The close recommendation includes a comment documenting why it is a duplicate -- same CVE tracked for the same stream (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: Both duplicate-check.md (lines 44-46) and triage-outcome.md (lines 33-34) include the proposed comment: 'Duplicate of TC-7999 -- same CVE (CVE-2026-31812) tracked for the same stream [rhtpa-2.2]. TC-7999 is already In Progress with Affects Versions [RHTPA 2.2.0, RHTPA 2.2.1]. Version impact analysis confirms overlap.' This explicitly documents same CVE and same stream as the reasons.

assertion_results.text: The analysis does NOT proceed to remediation task creation -- duplicate detection short-circuits the triage flow
assertion_results.evidence: duplicate-check.md lines 59-65: 'Because TC-8003 is recommended for closure as a duplicate in Step 4.1, the triage does not proceed to: Step 5 (Version Lifecycle Check), Step 6 (Already Fixed Check), Step 7 (Concurrent Triage Detection), Step 8 (Remediation)'. triage-outcome.md lines 45-47: 'No Remediation Tasks Created. Because TC-8003 is a duplicate of TC-7999 (which is already In Progress), no remediation tasks are created.' The procedure table (line 29) confirms: 'Steps 5-8 | Remaining steps | Not reached (duplicate closure)'.
